name: Bwap (Imperial Raised)
description: Also known as Wabs, or — less charitably — Newts, Bwaps are a semi-aquatic reptiloid species found throughout the Imperium. Each clan and family bears a distinctive skin pattern of greens, browns, yellows, or blues, determined by careful manipulation of the mother's diet during egg formation. Bwaps are uncomfortable at less than 98% humidity; their characteristic layered garments weave a network of fine water-filled tubes to keep their skin moist, and thin waterproof gloves protect delicate documents and electronics from inadvertent dampening. Humans often remark on the Bwap obsession with order and minutiae — but that structural thinking makes them superlative bureaucrats, administrators, mathematicians, scientists, and historians. Imperial-raised Bwaps have adapted their drive for systematic perfection to the vast legal and commercial apparatus of the Third Imperium, where their reputation for meticulous record-keeping and procedural mastery is well-earned and widely valued.

traits.name: Structured Mind
traits.description: Bwaps possess a deeply logical, hierarchical way of thinking. They receive a permanent Boon (roll 3D, keep the two highest) on all Admin and Science skill checks. This represents their extraordinary aptitude for procedure, taxonomy, and ordered systems — but it does not extend to improvisational or social tasks.

traits.name: Psionic Incompatibility
traits.description: The Bwap neural architecture is highly ordered and resistant to the chaotic resonances underlying psionic ability. Whenever a Bwap tests for psionic potential, the roll is made with a Bane (roll 3D, keep the two lowest) rather than the normal 2D. This is applied automatically by the engine.

traits.name: Moisture Dependent
traits.description: Bwap skin must be kept moist. Without their specialized clothing (a moisture-circulating garment and hood), they suffer increasing discomfort in dry environments. For purposes of equipment and survival in arid or vacuum conditions, Bwaps require their moisture-suit in addition to any other environmental protection. Role-play flavour; no additional mechanical penalty beyond the need for appropriate gear.

source: Traveller Core Rulebook (Mongoose Publishing); Bwap species detail from Aliens of Charted Space Vol. 1
